docTitle: Baebol long Map · Baebol long wan skrol
metaDesc: Folem taemlaen blong Olfala Testemen, laef blong Jisas, mo ol travel blong Pol long wan trufala map — Baebol i hapen long ol trufala ples.

s.kicker: Baebol long wan skrol · Ol Map
s.title: Baebol long Map
s.verse: “Taem mifala i talemaot long yufala, se Jisas Kraes* Masta* blong yumi i gat paoa, mo bambae hem i kambak bakegen, be mifala i no kasem ol samting ya long ol storian olbaot, nogat. Mifala tri, we long ae blong mitrifala, mifala i luk laet ya we i saenaot long Kraes, we i saen we i saen.” (2 Pita 1:16)
s.purpose: Baebol i no wan storian nomo. Hem i wan rekod blong ol man we oli wokbaot long ol trufala ples, ol det, mo ol nem. Folem ol rod ya long wan map, long stret oda blong taem — tajem wan poen, no pusum ▶ blong wokbaot long hem step long step.
s.ot_kick: ① Olfala Testemen — tru long taem
s.ot_h: Stat long kriesen i go kasem kambak long Jerusalem
s.ot_lead: I no wan travel nomo, be hem i fasin we histri blong sevem i ron i go stat long kriesen: kriesen mo foldaon → bigfala wota mo Babel → wan singaot (Ebraham) → promes graon → Eksodas → draeples → winim graon → kingdom → kingdom i brok → karemaot i go → kambak.
s.je_kick: ② Niufala Testemen — laef blong Jisas
s.je_h: Stat long Betlehem i go kasem Jerusalem
s.je_lead: Folem laef blong Jisas olsem we Foa Gud Nius i talem, long oda — stat long bon blong hem long Betlehem, i go tru long baptaes blong hem mo wok blong hem long Galili, i gotru long Sameria, i go kasem kros, laef bakegen, mo go antap long Jerusalem.
s.pa_kick: ③ Niufala Testemen — ol travel blong Pol
s.pa_h: Stat long Antiok i go kasem en blong wol — Rom
s.pa_lead: Stat long Pentekos long Jerusalem, olsem wanem gud nius i go aot i pas Judia — i gotru long Smol Esia mo Yurop i go kasem senta blong bigfala kantri. Jusum wan long ol faef travel (namba 1 · namba 2 · namba 3 + travel blong go long Rom + afta oli letem hem i go) mo folem ol samting blong Wok wetem ol leta we oli raetem long rod.
s.foot: Ol sos · Ol ples oli folem tok blong Baebol mo standad jiografi blong Baebol (wetem ol niufala nem we i givhan). Ol saed blong solwota, ol reva, mo ol lek oli kamaot long open jiografi data (Natural Earth), we oli mekem i moa simpol.
s.contact: Ol kwestin · tingting — Sanem imel long mifala

eden.name: Iden (Kriesen · Foldaon)
eden.note: Long wan wol we God i mekem i gud tumas, sin i kam insaed mo i brekem rod we i joenem God mo ol man.
events: Kriesen long sikis dei — “i gud tumas”
Man i kamaot olsem pija blong God
Foldaon, mo aot long Iden
Fas promes blong gud nius — “pikinini blong woman bambae i smasem hed blong snek”

noah.name: Ararat (Bigfala Wota)
noah.today: Hil Ararat, long is blong Turki tede
noah.note: God i jajem wan wol we i fulap long sin, be i sevem laef tru long wan famle nomo.
events: Wan wol we i fulap long rabis fasin
Bigfala wota, mo sip blong Noa
Kovenan blong renbo — “bambae i no moa gat bigfala wota blong spolem wol”

babel.name: Taoa blong Babel
babel.note: Agensem praod fasin we i traem kasem heven, God i mekem lanwis blong olgeta i kam defren mo i seraotem ol man long ful wol.
events: “Yumi bildim wan taon mo wan taoa … mo mekem nem blong yumi i bigfala”
God i mekem lanwis blong olgeta i kam defren
Ol man oli seraot long ful wol (Sinar — biaen i kam Babilon)

ur.name: Ua
ur.note: Stori blong sevem long Baebol i stat wetem singaot blong wan man nomo.
events: God i singaot Ebram i aot long Ua blong ol Kaldia
“Bambae mi mekem yu i kam wan bigfala laen … tru long yu bambae plante man oli kasem blesing”
Tru long bilif hem i aot long ples blong hem

haran.name: Haran
haran.note: Long rod, i ansa long singaot i go long promes graon.
events: Famle blong Tera i setel long Haran
Tera i ded
Ebram i aot i go long Kenan long taem we hem i gat 75 yia

shechem.name: Sekem · Kenan
shechem.note: Long promes graon wan famle i kamaot mo kovenan i go daon long ol jeneresen.
events: I go insaed long Kenan, fas olta — “bambae mi givim graon ya long ol laen blong yu”
Kovenan (Jen 15) · Aesak · Jekob
Twelef boe blong Jekob — rus blong twelef laen

egypt.name: Ijip (Gosen)
egypt.note: Wan famle i kam wan bigfala laen — biaen wan pipol blong slef.
events: Josef, we oli salem hem, i kam haeman blong rulum Ijip
Ful famle blong Jekob i kamdaon blong ronwe long taem blong bigfala hangkae
Isrel we i stap kam bigfala i kam slef

sinai.name: Hil Sinae
sinai.note: Bigfala sevem blong Olfala Testemen — ol slef oli kam pipol blong God.
events: Ten panis mo Pasova sipsip
Red Si i open mo oli krosem
Ten Loa, ol Loa, tabu haos mo ol sakrefaes

kadesh.name: Kades (draeples)
kadesh.note: Fasin blong no bilif i mekem wan jeneresen i lusum graon — be God i stap yet wetem olgeta.
events: Twelef spae — be ol man oli no wantem bilif
38 yia long draeples — mana, klaod mo faea
Long ol flat graon blong Moab, las prij blong Moses (Dutronome)

jericho.name: Jeriko
jericho.note: Long en oli go insaed mo oli tekem promes graon.
events: Reva Jodan i open mo ol man oli krosem
Ol wol blong Jeriko oli foldaon
Winim Kenan mo seraotem graon

shiloh.name: Sailo (Ol Jajes)
shiloh.note: Wetem no king, evri man i mekem samting we hem i wantem — i nidim wan trufala king.
events: Oli putum tabu haos long Sailo
Fasin we i kam plante taem: sin–trabol–sevem (Debora, Gideon, Samson)
Rut — fasin blong holem strong long ol tudak dei, long laen blong Deved

jerusalem.name: Jerusalem · Kingdom we i Joen
jerusalem.note: Gudfala taem blong Isrel — mo promes blong wan king we i stap oltaem.
events: Sol i fas king, biaen Deved mo Golaet
Kovenan blong Deved — “kingdom blong yu bambae i stap oltaem” (2 Sam 7)
Solomon i bildim tabu haos long Jerusalem

samaria.name: Sameria · Kingdom we i Brok
samaria.note: Kingdom i brok mo i go daon taem ol profet oli singaot.
events: Afta Solomon, i brok i kam Juda mo Isrel
Fasin blong giaman god i kam plante taem
Elaeja, Aesea, Jeremaea oli singaot ‘kambak’ — mo oli talemaot Mesaea

nineveh.name: Ninive (Asiria)
nineveh.note: I no lisin long ol woning, not i foldaon fastaem.
events: Ninive, bigfala taon blong Asiria
Kingdom blong not i foldaon long Asiria (722 BC)
Oli sanem Jona i go long Ninive

babylon.name: Babilon
babylon.note: Tudak naet olgeta — be promes blong stretem bakegen i stap yet.
events: Jerusalem i foldaon, tabu haos i bon (586 BC)
Oli karemaot Juda i go long Babilon
Daniel mo Esikel — bilif mo ol visen long taem blong karemaot i go

susa.name: Susa (Pesia)
susa.note: Nating long senta blong wan giaman kingdom, God i lukaot long ol man blong hem.
events: Pesia i winim Babilon
Esta i sevem ol man Jiu long fasin blong spolem olgeta
Nehemaea i prea long fes blong king mo oli sanem hem

return.name: Kambak long Jerusalem
return.note: Oli kambak mo oli bildim bakegen — be i no gat king i kam. Oli wet long Mesaea.
events: Tri taem blong kambak tru long oda blong Saerus (Serubabel 538 · Esra 458 · Nehemaea 444)
Oli bildim tabu haos bakegen mo stretem ol wol blong Jerusalem
Malakae — Olfala Testemen i en: “Bambae mi mi sanem wan man blong karem tok blong mi”

bethlehem.name: Betlehem
bethlehem.note: Mesaea we God i promes i kam long taon blong Deved — Tok i kam man.
events: I bon long Betlehem, taon blong Deved
Ol enjel oli talemaot nius long ol man blong lukaotem sipsip
Ol waes man oli kam blong wosipim hem

nazareth.name: Nasaret
nazareth.note: God i gruap olsem wan man long wan nomol taon.
events: Oli gruapem hem long haos blong wan kapenta
Long twelef yia, i askem mo i ansa long tabu haos
Biaen oli sakemaot hem long haos blong prea long taon blong hem

jordan.name: Reva Jodan
jordan.note: Wok blong hem long pablik i stat — heven i makem hem olsem Pikinini.
events: Jon i baptaesem hem
Spirit i kamdaon olsem wan pijin — “Hemia Pikinini blong mi we mi mi laekem hem tumas”
I winim tri traem blong Setan long draeples

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: Long fas merikel blong hem, hem i soemaot bigfala laet blong hem.
events: Hem i wan gest long wan mared
Wota i kam waen — fas merikel blong hem
Ol disaepol blong hem oli bilif long hem

sychar.name: Saeka (Sameria)
sychar.note: Rod blong fas wok — i gotru long Jerusalem mo i go kasem Sameria we ol man oli no laekem.
events: Hem i klinim tabu haos long Jerusalem
Long naet, Nikodimas — “Yu mas bon bakegen”
Wota blong laef long wan woman blong Sameria

capernaum.name: Kapaneam
capernaum.today: long saed blong lek Galili tede
capernaum.note: Senta blong wok long Galili — singaot, tijing, mo fasin blong agensem hem oli kam tugeta long hia.
events: I singaot ol man blong kasem fis mo i mekem hia i kam senta blong hem
Bigfala Prij long Hil — “Ol man we oli save se oli nidim God, oli save harem gud”
Ol pijatok blong kingdom — mo fasin blong agensem hem i kam antap

galilee.name: Lek blong Galili
galilee.note: Wetem paoa antap long ol samting blong wol, hem i soemaot hu hem i.
events: “Yu kwaet, yu stap kwaet” — hem i mekem bigfala win i kwaet
I givim kakae long 5,000 man wetem faef bred mo tu fis
I wokbaot antap long wota

caesarea_p.name: Sisaria Filipae
caesarea_p.note: Ol disaepol oli kasem save se hem i Kraes, mo rod blong kros i open.
events: Tok blong Pita — “Yu yu Kraes, Pikinini blong God we i laef”
Hem i talemaot fastaem ded mo laef bakegen blong hem
Fes blong hem i jenis mo i saen wetem bigfala laet antap long hil

jericho.name: Jeriko
jericho.note: Long rod i go antap long Jerusalem, hem i lukaotem ol man we oli lus.
events: Hem i openem ae blong Batimeas we i blaen
Hem i singaot Sakias, man blong tekem takis
“Pikinini blong Man i kam blong lukaotem mo sevem ol man we oli lus”

bethany.name: Betani
bethany.note: Hem i soemaot paoa antap long ded jes bifo las wik blong hem.
events: Hem i girapem Lasaros long beregraon — “Mi nao mi laef bakegen mo mi laef”
Meri i putum gudsmel oel long hem, i rerem hem blong berem
Merikel ya i mekem plan blong kilim hem i kam strong moa

jerusalem.name: Jerusalem
jerusalem.note: Bigfala poen we ful Baebol i poenem — kros, laef bakegen, go antap.
events: I go insaed long taon olsem king; hem i kapsaedem ol tebol long tabu haos bakegen
Long Las Kakae hem i wasem leg blong ol disaepol
Hem i ded long kros
I laef bakegen long namba tri dei, biaen i go antap

antioch.name: Antiok
antioch.note: Jos we i sanem, ples we wok long ol man we i no Jiu i stat mo i kambak long hem.
events: Long prea, Spirit i putum Banabas mo Sol i seperet blong wok
Jos we fastaem oli kolem ol disaepol ‘Kristin’
Ples we namba 1, namba 2, mo namba 3 travel oli stat

seleucia.name: Selusia
seleucia.note: Ples blong sip blong Antiok — oli go long sip i go long Saepras.

salamis.name: Salamis (Saepras)
salamis.note: Fas ples long Saepras — oli prij long ol haos blong prea.

paphos.name: Pafos
paphos.note: Paoa i soemaot agensem olgeta we oli agensem gud nius.
events: Elimas, man blong majik, i kam blaen
Serjias Paulas, bigman blong gavman, i bilif
Stat long hia, ‘Pol’ i lidim

perga.name: Perga
perga.note: Wan ples blong sip long Pamfilia — long hia Jon Mak i tanem baksaed.

pantioch.name: Antiok blong Pisidia
pantioch.note: Gud nius i open i go long ol man we i no Jiu.
events: Wan longfala prij long histri blong sevem long haos blong prea
Plante man we i no Jiu oli glad mo oli kasem tok
Oli ronemaot olgeta from fasin blong agensem

iconium.name: Ikoniam
iconium.note: Plante man oli bilif, be trabol i pusum olgeta blong gohed.

lystra.name: Listra
lystra.note: Oli onarem hem olsem wan god, biaen oli kilim hem wetem ston.
events: I mekem wan man we i bon we leg blong hem i nogud i kam gud
Bigfala grup oli traem mekem sakrefaes long tufala olsem tufala i god
Oli sutum hem wetem ston mo oli ting se hem i ded, be hem i girap

derbe.name: Debe
derbe.note: Plante disaepol oli kamaot; oli gobak long sem rod blong mekem ol jos i kam strong.

troas.name: Troas
troas.note: Ples blong jenis we gud nius i go fastaem long Yurop.
events: Wan visen blong wan man blong Masedonia
“Yu kam mo givhan long mifala”
Wantaem nomo oli krosem i go long Yurop

philippi.name: Filipae
philippi.note: Fas jos long Yurop — gud nius i win nating long kalabus.
events: Lidia, woman blong salem purpol kaliko, i bilif
Wan slef gel we i talem samting we bambae i kam i kam fri
Ol singsing long medel naet, wan graon i sek, mo famle blong man blong lukaot kalabus i sev

thess.name: Tesalonaeka
thess.note: Tok i seksekem taon mo fasin blong agensem i kam antap.
events: Long tri Sabat hem i eksplenem long haos blong prea
“Ol man ya we oli tanem wol i go antapdaon”
Oli aot kwaet long naet

berea.name: Berea
berea.note: Ol man we oli waes moa, we oli jekem tok olgeta wan.
events: Oli kasem tok wetem glad
Evri dei oli ridim ol tok blong Baebol blong jekem
Plante man oli kam bilif

athens.name: Atens
athens.note: Long taon blong ol man blong filosofia, hem i talemaot ‘god we oli no save.’
events: Hem i harem nogud from taon i fulap long ol giaman god
Long Areopagas hem i prij long God blong Kriesen mo laef bakegen
Oli tantanem hem, be sam man oli bilif

corinth.name: Korin
corinth.note: Hem i stap wan yia mo haf, i planem wan jos long wan taon we i fulap long rabis fasin.
events: Hem i wokem ol tent wetem Akwila mo Prisila
“Yu no fraet … from we mi mi stap wetem yu”
Plante man Korin oli bilif mo oli baptaes

ephesus.name: Efesas
ephesus.note: Senta blong namba tri travel — tok i go aot long ful Esia.
events: Tu yia hem i tijim evri dei long haos blong Taeranas
Oli bonem ol buk blong majik; ol samting we i gat paoa
Demetrias, man blong wok silva, i statem wan raorao

miletus.name: Miletas
miletus.note: Wan gudbae wetem wota blong ae long ol elda blong Efesas.
events: “Lukaotgud long jos we hem i pem wetem blad blong hem”
Ol elda oli krae, from oli save se bambae oli no luk hem bakegen

caesarea.name: Sisaria
caesarea.note: Blong tu yia hem i defenem gud nius long fes blong ol gavman mo wan king.
events: Ol kot long fes blong ol gavman, Filiks mo Festas
Hem i tok blong defenem hem long fes blong King Agripa
“Mi mi go long Sisa” — i go long Rom

jerusalem.name: Jerusalem
jerusalem.note: Oli holem hem long tabu haos, mo rod blong hem olsem wan man blong kalabus i stat.
events: Bigfala grup oli holem hem long tabu haos
Hem i tok blong defenem hem long fes blong kaonsel blong ol Jiu
Olsem wan man blong Rom, oli sanem hem aninit long ol soldia i go long Sisaria

myra.name: Maera
myra.note: Oli jenis i go long wan sip blong Aleksandria we i go long Rom.

fairhaven.name: Ol Gudfala Harba (Krit)
fairhaven.note: Woning blong Pol blong stop long sel, oli no lisin long hem.

crete.name: Krit
crete.note: Afta oli letem hem i go, aelan we hem i livim Taetas blong stretem ol jos.
events: I livim Taetas blong putum ol elda long evri taon
Hem i askem blong ol lida we oli no gat rong mo oli tru
Hem i raetem leta i go long Taetas

malta.name: Molta
malta.note: Tru long bigfala win mo sip we i brok, promes blong God i stap strong.
events: Wan bigfala win we i kam long not-is i brekem sip, be olgeta 276 man oli sev
Wan posen snek i kakaem hem, be i no kasem nogud
Hem i mekem ol sik man blong aelan i kam gud

syracuse.name: Sirakius
syracuse.note: Oli stap tri dei long Sisili.

puteoli.name: Puteoli
puteoli.note: Oli kasem Itali mo ol brata long bilif oli kam luk olgeta.

rome.name: Rom
rome.book: Wok 28 · Ol Leta blong Kalabus · 2 Timoti
rome.note: Gud nius i kasem senta blong bigfala kantri long en — i no wan en be hem i wan stat.
events: Tu yia aninit long kalabus long haos, i talemaot kingdom wetaot fraet
Long hia hem i raetem ol Leta blong Kalabus (Efesas·Filipae·Kolosi·Filimon)
Biaen oli putum hem long kalabus bakegen, hem i raetem 2 Timoti mo oli kilim hem i ded from bilif — “Mi mi faet long gudfala faet, mi mi finisim resis”

journeys.rome: Namba foa travel · i go long Rom
journeys.j5: Namba faef travel · afta oli letem hem i go
